instructions.objective: Integrate tracing/metrics into the monoio server for parity with tokio server. Emit request latency histograms, connection gauges, and error counters via `tracing`.
instructions.constraints: - Use `tracing` crate (already in deps) - Zero-allocation fast path when disabled - Minimal overhead on hot path - Follow patterns from harrow-server if applicable

context.tree: harrow-server-monoio/ ├── src/ │ ├── lib.rs # Server entry, accept loop │ ├── connection.rs # Per-connection handling, request lifecycle │ └── codec.rs # HTTP parsing (no changes needed) └── tests/ └── integration.rs

dep.name: tracing
dep.items: info!, debug!, warn!, error!, span!, instrument

guidance.notes: Key insertion points: - lib.rs: connection accepted, connection closed (gauge), shutdown - connection.rs: request start/end (latency), body size, errors Use tracing spans for request context propagation
